mapper.select: SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD, EMP_SEQ, EMP_NM, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC ORDER BY PJT_SN ASC

SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD, EMP_SEQ, EMP_NM, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC WHERE PJT_SN = #{pjtSn}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PJT_BASC SET PJT_NM = #{PJT_NM}, EMP_NM = #{EMP_NM}, PJT_BGNG_DT = #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, PJT_END_DT = #{PJT_END_DT}, PJT_STTS_CD = #{PJT_STTS_CD}, LAST_MDFCN_DT = #{LAST_MDFCN_DT}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{LAST_MDFR_ID} WHERE PJT_SN = #{PJT_SN}
